title: rhinanthus mediterraneus
intro: Rhinanthus mediterraneus, also known as Mediterranean Yellow Bartsia, is a flowering plant species in the bartsia family. It is a hemiparasitic perennial with medicinal properties, containing compounds like iridoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Rhinanthus mediterraneus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antitumor properties. Herbal preparations of Rhinanthus mediterraneus, such as infusions and tinctures, are traditionally used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
